question: What is the average number of activities per case?
sql_query: SELECT AVG(count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM activity GROUP BY case);
expected queryquery_result: SELECT COUNT(activity.id) / COUNT(DISTINCT cases.id) FROM activity INNER JOIN cases ON activity.case = cases.id;
duration: Error executing SQL query: Parser Error: syntax error at or near ")"
expected answer: Parser Error: syntax error at or near ")"

question: What is the most frequent activity performed in approved cases?
sql_query: SELECT name, COUNT(*) as count FROM activity INNER JOIN cases ON activity.case = cases.id WHERE approved = 1 GROUP BY name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;
expected queryquery_result: SELECT activity.name FROM activity INNER JOIN cases ON activity.case = cases.id WHERE cases.approved = TRUE GROUP BY activity.name ORDER BY COUNT(activity.id) DESC LIMIT 1;
duration: name: Revisión en emisión, count: 1112
expected answer: Revisión en emisión, count: 1112

question: What is the total value of cases that have at least 25 recorded activity?
sql_query: SELECT SUM(c.value) FROM cases c JOIN (SELECT a.case, COUNT(*) as count FROM activity a GROUP BY a.case HAVING count >= 25) b ON c.id = b.case;
expected queryquery_result: SELECT SUM(cases.value) FROM cases WHERE cases.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT case FROM activity);
duration: sum(c."value"): 2206200
